case_title: MARTA L RODRIGUEZ MONTOYA VS. LINDA WOLKOITCH

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,719.00 FILED BY RODRIGUEZ MONTOYA, MARTA L AS TO DEFENDANT WOLKOITCH, LINDA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-01-2022 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF MARTA RODRIGUEZ MONTOYA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT LINDA WOLKOITCH IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: D. AU / W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
